title: (Bullish Signal) ZYME, enters Uptrend as Momentum ascends above 0 level on Nov 20, 2020
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that ZYME's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 73 similar cases where ZYME's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 62 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 85%. Current price $47.99 is above $47.59 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 10/21/20 - 11/20/20, the price experienced a +16% Uptrend. During the week of 11/13/20 - 11/20/20, the stock enjoyed a +13% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/iij788ae21161.png?width=1528&format=png&auto=webp&s=171b4f521b5f59da84a984073fefee8df6b1b4ee

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on November 20, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on ZYME as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 62 of 73 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for ZYME just turned positive on November 12, 2020. Looking at past instances where ZYME's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise in 30 of 34 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 88%.

The 50-day Moving Average for ZYME moved above the 200-day moving average on October 16, 2020. This could be a long-term bullish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an upward trend.

Following a +4.26% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where ZYME advanced for three days, in 178 of 215 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.
